title: zea mays var. aestiva
intro: Zeal for ancient knowledge may lead one to discover Zea mays var. aestiva, also known as Silver Queen corn, a variety of corn that is prized for its ornamental value and ability to grow in cooler temperatures. This plant is a type of sweet corn that has been cultivated for centuries, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Zea mays var. aestiva include its ability to provide a rich source of antioxidants, fiber, and other essential nutrients, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet. Zea mays var. aestiva can be prepared in a variety of ways, including as a tea, tincture, or dried powder, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
